sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86564" key="proanatolh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προανα-τολή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n86564.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">earlier rising</tr_> (of the sun), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1383.tlg001:16:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Gem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.16</biblScope> </bibl>(pl.); of a star, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἑσπερία π. μὴ φαινομένη</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rising</tr_> above the Eastern horizon just <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">before</tr_> sunset, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Alm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
